description: Led test automation architecture and modernization efforts for a multi-tenant platform, improving maintainability, CI integration, and overall test reliability.
highlights: Architected and implemented a Playwright-based test automation framework for a multi-tenant platform supporting both B2B and B2C interfaces
Designed reusable page objects, fixtures, and data access patterns to support scalable, maintainable test development
Integrated automated testing into CI pipelines using GitHub Actions, improving consistency and reducing manual validation effort
Diagnosed and corrected systemic issues in an existing Cypress test suite, including test design, selector strategy, and environment configuration
